# Copilot Instructions

<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

This is a personal website project for a marine science student and part-time research assistant at Academia Sinica studying the Kuroshio Current. The project uses React with Vite and focuses on:

- Professional academic presentation
- Ocean/marine science theme
- Modern responsive design
- Clean and accessible UI
- Sections: About, Research, Projects, Publications, Contact

Please ensure all generated code follows React best practices and maintains the ocean theme throughout the design.
